projects.title: Harborlight Heat & Shade Atlas
projects.summary: A fictional training prototype for organizing invented heat and shade observations into reviewable decisions.

projects.title: Prairie Reservoir Outlook
projects.summary: A synthetic decision-support exercise comparing generalized water-supply scenarios in an invented demonstration region.

projects.title: Coastal Access Sketch
projects.summary: A fictional analysis exercise connecting generalized coastal orientation points with continuity planning notes.

projects.title: Delta Crop Calendar Prototype
projects.summary: A synthetic web-application concept for comparing invented agricultural calendar windows across broad demonstration regions.

projects.title: Mountain Snowpack Storyboard
projects.summary: A fictional training storyboard using a generalized mountain region to practice clear water-resource communication.

projects.title: Great Lakes Air and Heat Notebook
projects.summary: A synthetic research notebook exercise relating invented air-quality and heat questions to generalized urban orientation points.

projects.title: Island Water Security Catalog
projects.summary: A fictional data-product catalog for practicing documentation of generalized island-region water questions.

projects.title: National EO Training Index
projects.summary: A national-scope synthetic index used to demonstrate a continuing project record with no mapped service area.

projects.title: Forest Recovery Signals Lab
projects.summary: A fictional research lab exercise using a generalized forest region to discuss recovery-signal limitations.

projects.title: River Basin Decision Briefs
projects.summary: A synthetic decision-support exercise comparing two separate generalized river-basin demonstration regions.
